title: Deliciously Tangy Egyptian Lamb Casserole
description: A tangy and snappy Egyptian dish featuring lamb, cheddar cheese, and a crispy en-croute crust, perfect for a high-protein meal prep option.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat and cook the lamb until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion and garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked lamb mixture, cheddar cheese, salt, and black pepper.
Arrange the pita bread slices in the bottom of a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Spoon the lamb and cheese mixture over the pita bread.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
